name: Animal Feed
description: Feed for one kind of companion (hound, falcon, horse…). Feed them each camp or they weaken.

name: Bedroll
description: Sleeping without shelter marks you Stressed — a bedroll counts toward having shelter.

name: Candles
properties: Bright light for the holder, dim for the guild
Goes out if dropped (can be relit)
2 flickers of fuel
description: Cheap light. Can be snuffed and relit; burns through two flickers before it's spent.

name: Chalk
description: Mark passages in the maze, warn of traps, draw what words can't say.

name: Clothes, Rags
description: Enough to preserve your dignity — barely. Worn clothes take no slots; spares take one.

name: Firewood
description: A campfire even in the deepest dark. Fire counts toward shelter at camp.

name: Flint and Tinder
description: Start fires.

name: Iron Spikes
description: Wedge doors, anchor ropes. Six share a slot; drive them with a hammer.

name: Lard
description: Burns well, greases mechanisms and surfaces, and in a pinch counts as a ration.

name: Leeches, Jar of
properties: Camp: draw a card — Cups or Wands counts as 2 charges toward curing an affliction
description: Medicinal leeches. Applied at camp they may draw out an affliction.

name: Pipe and Pipeweed
properties: Smoke it all to clear Stressed
description: A little comfort in the dark. Finishing the pouch clears the Stressed condition.

name: Pole, 10'
description: Prod suspicious flagstones from a respectful distance. Oversized: rides the belt, never the pack.

name: Poultice
properties: Expend at Death's Door: test Wands (favor with a medical motif) to save them
description: Herb-soaked bandages. The difference between a funeral and a bad week; also what a chirurgeon works with.

name: Rations
description: Hardtack, dried fruit and meat, and a canteen of water (or swill). Eat one when the guild breaks bread or mark Stressed.

name: Religious Paraphernalia
properties: Brandish: test Wands to displace one undead or spirit
description: Icons, amulets, rosaries — the courage to hold the dark at arm's length.

name: Rope
description: Fifty feet. There is no dungeon problem rope does not improve.

name: Axe
properties: Take-down: downing a foe lets the same Attack value strike another enemy in the zone
Can be wielded two-handed
description: Hatchets of war. When one enemy falls, the swing carries into the next.

name: Blade
properties: Riposte deals 2 Wounds instead of 1
Can be wielded two-handed
description: Swords long and short. In a fencer's hands, the counter-cut bites twice as deep.

name: Bow
properties: Ranged
Aim (Swords): bank a facedown card, reveal on the shot to add its value
Melee attackers gain favor against you
description: Needs arrows. Patient hands make impossible shots.

name: Crossbow
properties: Ranged
All Attacks deal Piercing damage
Reload/crank as a miscellaneous action
Melee attackers gain favor against you
description: Needs bolts. Slow to span, but armor means nothing to it.

name: Dagger
properties: Piercing vs unarmed, Rooted, or Tripped targets
Throwable without engaging
description: Stilettos and dirks. Ugly work up close; the only blade that can't be swung two-handed.

name: Flail
properties: Attacks cannot be absorbed by shields
Always wins Initiative ties
Can be wielded two-handed
description: Ball-and-chain and morning star. It curls around shields as if they weren't there.

name: Hammer / Mace
properties: Attack ≥ 2× the target's Initiative deals 2 Wounds
Can be wielded two-handed
description: Blunt and final. Catch a foe flat-footed and something breaks.

name: Polearm
properties: Ripostes are interrupts
Two-handed
description: Spears, halberds, quarterstaffs. Reach turns defense into offense.

name: Arrows
description: A quiver's dozen per slot. Hits destroy the arrow; misses can be recovered; fletch more at camp.

name: Bolts
description: Crossbow bolts, twelve to a slot. Hits destroy the bolt; misses can be recovered.

name: Armor, Light
properties: Worn: takes 1 belt slot
Absorbs 1 Notch
description: Leather jerkin, orcish furs, lacquered bone. Turns one blow that would have been you.

name: Caltrops
properties: Scattered: unshod creatures crossing take a Wound
description: Deny the ground behind you.

name: Chain
description: Ten feet per slot. Binds what rope can't hold.

name: Clothes, Common
description: Serviceable and unremarkable — good for dirty work.

name: Cooking Gear
description: Turn hunted game into rations at camp.

name: Crowbar
properties: Pry doors and chests: test Swords
description: Louder than lockpicks, and the door doesn't survive either way.

name: Fishing Gear
description: Pull food from the Underworld's waters — where the waters allow it.

name: Garlic
properties: Brandish: test Wands to displace the impure
description: The old wards work. Undead and impure spirits recoil from a firm hand and a full bulb.

name: Grappling Hook
properties: With rope: climb sheer surfaces without testing fate
description: Thrown iron fingers. Bring rope — it's a separate slot.

name: Hammer (tool)
description: Drive spikes and pitons, break what needs breaking. Smashing with a weapon notches the weapon instead.

name: Hatchet
description: Fell wood, cut rope, open a stubborn door — at some cost to the edge.

name: Helm
properties: Worn on the head (no belt slots)
Absorbs 1 Notch
description: Turns one blow aside before it's spent.

name: Hermetic Bottle
properties: Fragile: destroyed after 1 Notch
description: Sealed glass for reagents, oils, bombs, and potions. An alchemist's other hand.

name: Lockpicks
properties: Pick a lock: test Pentacles — failure snaps a pick
description: Six slender answers per slot; every failed question costs one.

name: Mirror
description: Hygiene, corner-peeking, and the polite way to meet a petrifying gaze.

name: Musical Instrument
description: Lute, harp, flute, or drum — keeps the campfire merry.

name: Pick
description: Digging iron. Oversized: rides the belt, never the pack.

name: Quill and Ink
description: For maps, letters, and literary ambitions.

name: Shield, Light
properties: Held: ties in Challenges go to you, not the attacker
May swap Initiative for a hand card (miscellaneous action)
Absorbs 1 Notch
description: A wooden answer to sharp questions. Sling it on your back to free the hand.

name: Shovel
description: Digging steel. Oversized: rides the belt, never the pack.

name: Tinker's Kit
properties: Camp: remove 1 Notch from an item (can't salvage the Destroyed)
description: Scrap, files, and patience. Keeps good gear from becoming grave goods.

name: Torch
properties: Bright light for the holder, dim for the guild
Dropped: 50% chance it dies (and can't be relit)
3 flickers of fuel
description: Honest fire on a stick. Burns through three flickers.

name: Wolfsbane
properties: Brandish: test Wands to displace wolves and lycanthropes
description: The flower the moon-cursed cannot abide.

name: Alchemy Kit
description: Alembics, burners, and measures — turns monster reagents into potions, oils, and bombs at camp.

name: Armor, Iron
properties: Worn: takes 2 belt slots
Absorbs 2 Notches
Spells cannot target the wearer (spell effects still apply)
No swimming, sneaking, or spellcasting
description: Iron mail over a padded gambeson — the bane of sorcerers, and of subtlety.

name: Armor, Steel
properties: Worn: takes 3 belt slots
Absorbs 3 Notches
No swimming, sneaking, or spellcasting
description: Full plate. The best answer to steel there is; magic is another matter.

name: Bezoar
properties: Swallow: counts as 8 burned charges toward curing an affliction
description: A stone from a goat's stomach, worth more than gold when the poison sets in.

name: Blank Book
description: For notes, maps, and the memoir you keep threatening to write.

name: Booze, Fancy
description: Strong, expensive, and openable exactly once — trade it, gift it, or mark the occasion.

name: Clothes, Finery
description: Sets you apart in the City. Adventure will ruin it — adventure ruins everything nice.

name: Falconry Gear
description: Gloves, tethers, and hoods — everything the hawk expects of you.

name: Hourglass
description: Time flows strangely below. Glass and sand keep it honest.

name: Lantern
properties: Bright light for the holder, dim for the guild
Dropped: destroyed
Belt-tied: shatters (and oils you) if you take a Wound
Burns oil: 4 flickers per flask
description: Steady shuttered light — as long as nothing jostles it.

name: Manacles
description: For bringing someone back to the City — and the reward posted for them.

name: Oil, Flask
properties: Fuels a lantern (4 flickers)
description: Lantern fuel, fire-starter, lubricant. Flammable in every helpful and unhelpful way.

name: Shield, Heavy
properties: Held: ties in Challenges go to you, not the attacker
May swap Initiative for a hand card (miscellaneous action)
Absorbs 2 Notches
description: Metal-faced and unarguable. Sling it on your back to free the hand.

name: Spyglass
properties: Magnifies up to 5×
description: See trouble before trouble sees you.

name: Tent
properties: Shelters two — counts toward shelter at camp
description: Comfortable sleeping for two. Oversized: rides the belt, never the pack.

name: Wand of Archwood
properties: With Gramarye: a missile weapon of magical blasts (up to one zone)
description: Cut from willing archwood — the sorcerer's ritual implement and, for the learned, a weapon.

name: Weaponry, Silver
properties: Effective against lycanthropes, spirits, and certain undead
Soft: absorbs only 1 Notch
description: Any weapon, cast in moon-metal. It bites what iron can't — and bends where iron wouldn't.
